sections.name: Archetype Use
sections.text: This feat can be used for one or more archetypes in addition to the listed classes. When selected this way, the feat does not have its class traits.

feat.name: Expanded Domain Initiate
feat.text: You have long venerated one of your deity's lesser-known aspects. Select one domain from your deity's alternate domains. You gain access to that domain and an initial domain spell for that domain.

traits.name: Cleric
traits.text: This indicates abilities from the cleric class.

archetype.name: Soul Warden
archetype.note: This archetype offers Expanded Domain Initiate at a different level than displayed here.
